case_title: VERNATTER, JOHN VS K.J. WOODS CONTRUCTION et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-16-2007, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-27-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 FOR SERVICE ON DEFENDANT J. K. WOODS CONSTRUCTION.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,952.67 FILED BY VERNATTER, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT K.J. WOODS CONTRUCTION CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-16-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNDELIVERED SENT TO ANY AUTHORIZED PERSON FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS FOR K.J. WOODS CONSTRUCTION.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-27-2007, CONTINUED BY COURT TO APR-18-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 PLAINTIFF TO SERVE DEFENDANTS.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VERNATTER, JOHN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT K.J. WOODS CONTRUCTION CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
CON'T REQUEST FILED BY PLFT. REQUEST DTE: 4/18/07; $10 FEES PAID BY CHECK.
